Minute Order
Minute Order
PETITION FOR RESENTENCINGPC1170,95 FILED
DEFT PETITION FOR RESETENCING PC1170,95 & APPT OF COUNSEL - FILED

/CAL:DETERINATION OF PRIMA FACIE CASE/NP/X:NO ATTORNEY APPOINTED,/X:UPONREVIEW OF THE DOCKET AND THE COURT OF APPEALS OPINION IN THIS CASE,THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE HAS NOT BEEN A PRIMA FACIE CASE SHOWN,/X:PETITIONER TILLIS IS NOT ELIGIBLE UNDER PC1170,95,AND THE PETITION IS DENIED,/
/CAL: PETITION FOR RESENTENCING PC 1170,95/DAWT/PD/X: DEFENSE WAIVES TIME UNTIL 07-19-22/CONTD: TO SET PETITION FOR RESENTENCING PC1170,95/
/CAL:SET FOR RESENTENCING/DAWT/CONTD:DETERMINATION OF PRIMA FACIE CASE (PRONG 1)/
/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/
AJW/SP15Y-LIFE,12022,5(A)PC SP4Y(M)=SP19Y-LIFE/VF1/APPEAL & PAROLE RTS380CJ--190SAGE=CTS570D
SEE 5/25/94 CALENDAR
JURY FND DEFT NG CT1-187PC/F/1 & FND G CT1-187PC/F/2;DEFT WVS TIME SENTCONT 6/29/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR SENT;NB
CONT 5/26/94 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 5/25/94 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 5/24/94 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL;ALLEG 12022,5(A)PC FND TRUE
CONT 5/23/94 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 5/18/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT TO 5/17/94 IN D25 AT 945AM FOR CONT'D TRIAL
DEFT CONT TO WVD TRIAL;CONT 5/16/94 945AM S25 FOR TRIAL;MO 1101(B)EC DEN
CONT TO 10AM IN D25 5/12/94 FOR TRIAL
CONT TO 5/11/94
CONT 5/10/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR TRIAL
TRANSF-D25 FOR TRL AT 845AM ON 5/10/94;B/A FOR D/WILSON TO ISSUE;NO BAIL
DEFT ENT GEN TIME WVR;CONT 5/9/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22;VAC 2/28/94
DEEMED PRETRIED
CONT 2/10/94 AT 9AM IN S21 FOR FUR PTC
CONT 2/8/94 AT 845AM IN S21 FOR FUR PTC
TRANSF TO D21 FOR PTC F/W
CNSL RET;ARRD;PLEA OF NG ENT;ALLEGS DENIED;DEFT ENT GEN TIME WAIVERCONT 1/20/94 2PM FOR PTC AND 2/28/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
CONT 11/23/93 AT 9AM FOR ARR IN D22
B/S $500,000--SAME AS DA WRT BAIL
